text.en: Does 20 damage to each Defending Pokémon.
text.fr: Inflige 20 dégâts à chaque Pokémon Défenseur.
text.de: Does 20 damage to each Defending Pokémon.

text.en: You may discard as many cards as you like from your hand. If you do, remove that many damage counters from Ludicolo.
text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser autant de cartes de votre main que vous le voulez. Retirez alors à Ludicolo autant de marqueurs de dégât que de cartes défaussées.
text.de: You may discard as many cards as you like from your hand. If your do, remove that many damage counters from Ludicolo.

text.en: Does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's), excluding Ludicolo.
text.fr: Inflige 10 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de Pokémon en jeu (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire), Ludicolo exclus.
text.de: Does 10 damage times the number of Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's), excluding Ludicolo

text.en: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.
text.fr: Choisissez 1 carte de la main de votre adversaire sans regarder et défaussez-la.
text.de: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Hariyama ex by attacks is increased by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Lors du prochain tour de votre adversaire, tous dégâts infligés à Hariyama ex par des attaques sont augmentés de 10 (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
text.de: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Hariyama ex by attacks is increased by 10 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Your opponent can't play any Trainer cards (except for Supporter cards) from his or her hand during your opponent's next turn.
text.fr: Votre adversaire ne peut pas jouer de cartes Dresseur de sa main (cartes Supporter exclues) lors de son prochain tour.
text.de: Your opponent can't play any Trainer cards (except for Supporter cards) from his or her hand during your opponent's next turn.

text.en: Discard all Lightning Energy attached to Manectric ex and then choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Défaussez toutes les Énergies  attachées à Elecsprint ex puis choisissez 1 des Pokémon de votre adversaire. Cette attaque lui inflige 80 dégâts (Vous ne pouvez pas appliquer la Faiblesse et la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc).
text.de: Discard all  Energy attached to Manectric ex and then choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Does 20 damage for each basic Energy card attached to Rayquaza ex.
text.fr: Inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque carte Énergie de base attachée à Rayquaza ex.
text.de: Does 20 damage for each basic Energy card attached to Rayquaza ex.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
text.fr: Choisissez 1 des Pokémon de votre adversaire. Cette attaque lui inflige 40 dégâts. Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Faiblesse ou la Résistance.
text.de: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

text.en: Discard 2 Energy attached to Salamence ex.
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies attachées à Drattak ex.
text.de: Discard 2 Energy attached to Salamence ex.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Before doing damage, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with the Defending Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 20 damage to the new Defending Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Defending Pokémon to switch.
text.fr: Avant d'infliger des dégâts, vous pouvez échanger 1 des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire avec le Pokémon Défenseur. Cette attaque inflige alors 20 dégâts au nouveau Pokémon Défenseur. Votre adversaire choisit le Pokémon Défenseur à échanger.
text.de: Before doing damage, you may switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with the Defending Pokémon. If you do, this attack does 20 damage to the new Defending Pokémon. Your opponent chooses the Defending Pokémon to switch.

text.en: You may discard a Darkness Energy attached to Sharpedo ex. If you do, this attack does 60 damage plus 20 more damage and discard 1 Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.
text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser une Énergie  attachée à Sharpedo ex. Cette attaque inflige alors 60 dégâts plus 20 dégâts supplémentaires. Défaussez une carte Énergie attachée au Pokémon Défenseur.
text.de: You may discard a  Energy attached to Sharpedo ex. If you do, this attack does 60 damage plus 20 more damage and discard 1 Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon (including Latias ☆).
text.fr: Retirez 1 marqueur de dégât à chacun de vos Pokémon (Latias ☆ inclus).
text.de: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon (including Latias ☆).

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon is Pokémon-ex, discard all Energy cards attached to Latias ☆ and this attack does 50 damage plus 100 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur est un Pokémon-ex, défaussez toutes les cartes Énergie attachées à Latias ☆. Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts plus 100 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.de: If the Defending Pokémon is Pokémon-ex, dicard all Energy cards attached to Latias ☆ and this attack does 50 damage plus 100 more damage.

rules_text.en: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

text.en: Remove 1 damage counter and all Special Conditions from Latios ☆.
text.fr: Retirez à Latios ☆ 1 marqueur de dégât et tous ses États Spéciaux.
text.de: Remove 1 damage counter and all Special Conditiones from Latios ☆.

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon is a Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon, discard all Energy cards attached to Latios ☆ and this attack does 50 damage plus 100 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur est un Pokémon Évolué de niveau 2, défaussez toutes les cartes Énergie attachées à Latios ☆. Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts plus 100 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.de: If the Defending Pokémon is a Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon, discard all Energy cards attached to Latios ☆ and this attack does 50 damage plus 100 more damage.

rules_text.en: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à ce que vous obteniez pile. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de faces.
text.de: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

text.en: Discard all Energy cards attached to Rayquaza ☆. This attack does 100 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon-ex. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Défaussez toutes les cartes Énergie attachées à Rayquaza ☆. Cette attaque inflige 100 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon-ex de votre adversaire. (Vous ne pouvez pas appliquer la Faiblesse et la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)
text.de: Discard all Energy cards attached to Rayquaza ☆. This attack does 100 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon-ex. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for benched Pokémon.)

rules_text.en: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

text.en: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Lightning Energy attached to Rocket's Raikou ex.

text.de: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each  Energy attached to Rocket's Raikou ex.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: If Metagross and the Defending Pokémon have a different amount of Energy attached to them, this attack's base damage is 40 instead of 70.
text.fr: Si Metalosse et le Pokémon Défenseur ont un total d'Énergie différent, les dégâts de base de cette attaque sont de 40 et non de 70.
text.de: If Metagross and the Defending Pokémon have a different amount of Energy attached to them, this attack's base damage is 40 instead of 70.

text.en: Search your deck for any 1 card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
text.fr: Choisissez n'importe quelle carte dans votre deck et placez-la dans votre main. Ensuite, mélangez votre deck.
text.de: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

text.en: If your opponent has 5 or more cards in his or her hand, your opponent discards a number of cards until your opponent has 4 cards left in his or her hand.
text.fr: Si votre adversaire a 5 cartes ou plus dans sa main, il doit défausser des cartes jusqu'à ce qu'il ne lui reste plus que 4 cartes en main.
text.de: If your opponent has 5 or more cards in his or her hand, your opponent dicard a number of cards until your opponent has 4 cards left in his or her hand.

text.en: During your next turn, Ninjask's Slash attack's base damage is 80.

text.en: Put 2 damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. If the Defending Pokémon is Pokémon-ex, put 4 damage counters instead.
text.fr: Placez 2 marqueurs de dégât sur le Pokémon Défenseur. Si le Pokémon Défenseur est un Pokémon-ex, placez 4 marqueurs de dégât sur ce Pokémon.
text.de: Put 2 damage counters on the Defending Pokémon. If the Defending Pokémon is Pokémon-ex, put 4 damage counters instead.

text.en: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

text.de: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

text.en: Slaking is now Asleep.
text.fr: Monaflemit est maintenant Endormi.

text.de: If Deoxys and the Defending Pokémon have a different amout of Energy attached to them, this attack's base damage is 20 instead 40.

text.en: Search your deck for a card that evolves from Wurmple and put it on Wurmple. (This counts as evolving Wurmple.) Shuffle your deck afterward.
text.fr: Cherchez dans votre deck une carte qui évolue de Chenipotte et placez-la sur Chenipotte. (Vous faites ainsi évoluer Chenipotte.) Ensuite, mélangez votre deck.
text.de: Search your deck for a card that evolves from Wurmple and out it on Wurmple. (This count as evolving Wurmple.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Special Condition. Each Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, choisissez 1 État Spécial. Chaque Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant affecté par cet État Spécial.
text.de: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 Special Condition. Each Defending Pokémon is now affected by that Special Condition.

rules_text.en: Attach Balloon Berry to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card. As long as Balloon Berry is attached to a Pokémon, that Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 0. When this Pokémon retreats, discard Balloon Berry.
rules_text.fr:
Attachez Baie Ballon à 1 de vos Pokémon qui ne possède pas déjà d'Outil Pokémon. Si ce Pokémon est mis K.O., défaussez-la.

Tant que Baie Ballon est attachée à un Pokémon, le Coût de retraite de ce Pokémon est de 0. Lorsqu'il bat en retraite, défaussez-la.
rules_text.de: When the Pokémon Balloon Berry is attached to retreats, discard Balloon Berry instead of discarding Energy cards.

rules_text.en: Attach Crystal Shard to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card. As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, that Pokémon's type is Colorless. If that Pokémon attacks, discard this card at the end of the turn.
rules_text.fr:
Attachez Écharde de cristal à 1 de vos Pokémon qui ne possède pas déjà d'Outil Pokémon. Si ce Pokémon est mis K.O., défaussez-la.

Tant que cette carte est attachée à un Pokémon, ce Pokémon est de type . S'il attaque, défaussez cette carte à la fin du tour.
rules_text.de: So lange diese Karte an ein Pokémon angelegt ist, ist der Typ (Farbe) dieses Pokémon . Greift das Pokémon an, lege diese Karte am Ende des Zuges auf deinen Ablagestapel.

rules_text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, search your discard pile for 2 Energy cards (1 if there is only 1), show them to your opponent, and shuffle them into your deck.
rules_text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cherchez dans votre pile de défausse 2 cartes Énergie (ou 1 s'il n'y en a qu'1), montrez-les à votre adversaire et mélangez-les à votre deck.
rules_text.de: Wirf eine Münze. Mische bei 'Kopf' 2 Energiekarten aus deinem Ablagestapel in dein Deck (1, wenn du nur 1 hast).

rules_text.en: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Search your deck for up to 3 different types of basic Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
rules_text.fr: Choisissez dans votre deck jusqu'à trois cartes Énergie de base différentes, montrez-les à votre adversaire et placez-les dans votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
rules_text.de: Search your deck for up to 3 different types of basic Energy cards, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

rules_text.en: Look at the top 7 cards from your deck. Choose a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card from those cards, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Put the other 6 cards back on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.
rules_text.fr: Regardez les 7 cartes du dessus de votre deck. Parmi ces cartes, vous pouvez choisir une carte Pokémon de base ou une carte Évolution. Montrez-la à votre adversaire et ajoutez-la à votre main. Mélangez le reste à votre deck.
rules_text.de: Look at 7 cards from the top of your deck. You may choose a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card from those cards, show it yout opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

rules_text.en: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. Each player's Active Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) can use any attack from its Basic Pokémon or its Stage 1 Evolution card. (You still have to pay for that attack's Energy cost.)
rules_text.fr: Cette carte reste en jeu lorsque vous la jouez. Défaussez -la si une autre carte Stade est mise en jeu.
rules_text.de: Each player's Active Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex) can use any attack from its Basic Pokémon or its Stage 1 Evolution card. (You still have to pay for that attack's Energy cost.)

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon has any Poké-Bodies, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur possède des Poké-Bodies, cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts plus 30 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.de: If the Defending Pokémon has any Poke-Bodies, this attack does 20 damage plus 30 more damage.

rules_text.en: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Flip a coin. If heads, draw the bottom 3 cards of your deck. If tails, draw the top 2 cards of your deck.
rules_text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, piochez les 3 dernières cartes de votre deck. Si c'est pile, piochez les 2 cartes du dessus de votre deck.
rules_text.de: Flip a coin. If heads, draw the bottom 3 cards of your deck. If tails, draw the top2 cards of your deck.

rules_text.en: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. Ignore Poké-Bodies for all Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name).
rules_text.fr: Cette carte reste en jeu lorsque vous la jouez. Défaussez -la si une autre carte Stade est mise en jeu.
rules_text.de: Ignore Poke-Bodies for all Basic Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) (excluding Pokémon-ex and Pokémon that has an owner in its name).

rules_text.en: Attach Strength Charm to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If that Pokémon is Knocked Out, discard this card. Whenever an attack from the Pokémon that Strength Charm is attached to does damage to the Active Pokémon, the attack does 10 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Discard Strength Charm at the end of the turn in which this Pokémon attacks.
rules_text.fr:
Attachez Fétiche de force à 1 de vos Pokémon qui ne possède pas déjà d'Outil Pokémon. Si ce Pokémon est mis K.O., défaussez-la.

Dès que le Pokémon auquel est attaché Fétiche de force inflige des dégâts au Pokémon Actif, cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance). Défaussez Fétiche de force à la fin du tour au cours duquel ce Pokémon attaque.
rules_text.de: Whenever an attack from the Pokémon that Strength Charm is attached to does damage to the Active Pokémon, the attack does 10 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Discard Strength Charm at the end of the turn in which this Pokémon attacks.

rules_text.en: Boost Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon. Discard Boost Energy at the end of the turn it was attached. Boost Energy provides ColorlessColorlessColorless Energy. The Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to can't retreat. If the Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to isn't an Evolved Pokémon, discard Boost Energy.
rules_text.de: Boost Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon. Discard Boost Energy at the end of the turn it was attached. Boost Energy provides	Energy. The Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to can't retreat. If the Pokémon Boost Energy is attached to isn't an Evolved Pokémon, discard Boost Energy.
rules_text.fr: Énergie super ne peut être attachée qu'à un Pokémon Évolué. Défaussez -la à la fin du tour au cours duquel elle a été attachée. Énergie super fournit une Énergie Incolore Incolore Incolore. Le Pokémon auquel Énergie super est attachée ne peut pas battre en retraite. Si le Pokémon auquel Énergie super est attachée n'est pas un Pokémon Évolué, défaussez-la.

rules_text.en: Heal Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove 1 damage counter and all Special Conditions from that Pokémon. If Heal Energy is attached to Pokémon-ex, Heal Energy has no effect other than providing Energy.
rules_text.de: Heal Energy provides  Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove 1 damage counter and all Special Conditions from that Pokémon. If heals Energy is attached to Pokémon-ex, Heal Energy has no effect other than providing Energy.
rules_text.fr: Énergie guérisseuse fournit une Énergie Incolore. Lorsque vous l'attachez de votre main à 1 de vos Pokémon, retirez à ce Pokémon 1 marqueur de dégât et tous ses États Spéciaux. Si Énergie guérisseuse est attachée à un Pokémon-ex, elle n'a pas d'autre effet que de fournir de l'Énergie.

rules_text.en: Scramble Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). Scramble Energy provides Colorless Energy. While in play, if you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, Scramble Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 3 in any combination at a time. If the Pokémon Scramble Energy is attached to isn't an Evolved Pokémon (or evolves into Pokémon-ex), discard Scramble Energy.
rules_text.de: Scramble Energy can be attached only to an Evolved Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-ex). Scramble Energy provides  Energy. While in play, if you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, Scramble Energy provides every type of Energy but provide only 3 in any combination at a time. If the Pokémon Scramble Energy is attached to isn't an Evolved Pokémon (or evolves into Pokémon-ex). discard Scramble Energy.
rules_text.fr: Énergie codée ne peut être attachée qu'à un Pokémon Évolué (Pokémon-ex exclus). Énergie codée fournit une Énergie Incolore. Lorsqu'elle est en jeu, s'il vous reste plus de cartes Récompenses que votre adversaire, Énergie codée fournit tous les types d'Énergie mais seulement 3 de n'importe quelle combinaison à la fois. Si le Pokémon auquel Énergie codée est attachée n'est pas un Pokémon Évolué (ou un Pokémon qui évolue en Pokémon-ex), défaussez -la.

text.en: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. If you get 2 or more heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Lancez 4 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de faces. Si vous obtenez 2 faces ou plus, le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Confus.
text.de: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. If you get 2 or more heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 60 damage plus 40 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur est affecté par un État Spécial, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts plus 40 dégâts supplémentaires.
text.de: If the Defending Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 60 damage plus 40 more damage.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Deoxys ex and the Defending Pokémon.
text.fr: Inflige 10 dégâts plus 10 dégâts pour chaque Énergie attachée à Deoxys ex et au Pokémon Défenseur.
text.de: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Deoxys ex and the Defending Pokémon.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: You may discard 2 Energy attached to Deoxys ex. If you do, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.
text.fr: Vous pouvez défausser 2 Énergies attachées à Deoxys ex. Cette attaque inflige alors 50 dégâts plus 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Défenseur.
text.de: You may discard 2 Energy cards from Deoxys ex. If you do, this attack does 50 damage plus 30 more damage for each Energy attached at the Defending Pokémon.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

text.en: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Deoxys ex by your opponent's Pokémon-ex during your opponent's next turn.
text.fr: Prévenez tous les effets d'une attaque, dégâts inclus, infligés à Deoxys ex par le Pokémon-ex de votre adversaire lors du prochain tour de votre adversaire.
text.de: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Deoxys ex by your opponent's Pokémon-ex during your opponent's next turn.

rules_text.en: When Pokémon-ex has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
